List Available Scenario Presets

Source: R/scenarios.R
list_scenarios.Rd

Return a tidy catalogue of the built-in scenario presets. Each scenario is a hard-coded recipe of argument-lists targeting one simulate_* function. Print the result directly.

Usage

list_scenarios()

Value

A base data.frame with one row per scenario and columns scenario, description, simulator (the target simulate_* function) and n_cases (number of argument-lists in the recipe).

Examples

list_scenarios()
#>             scenario                                           description
#> 1        power_ttest Two-group t-test power grid: Cohen's d x sample size.
#> 2      mlm_icc_sweep Multilevel model sweeping the intraclass correlation.
#> 3         irt_models     IRT response data across 1PL, 2PL and 3PL models.
#> 4 survival_censoring            Survival data sweeping the censoring rate.
#>           simulator n_cases
#> 1    simulate_ttest       6
#> 2      simulate_mlm       4
#> 3      simulate_irt       3
#> 4 simulate_survival       3
